Welcome to this website, a sister domain of www.jagadambaholidays.com. Clicking the button will redirect you to the parent domain of Jagadamba Holidays Private Limited.

Trekking

Everest Base Camp Trek

The Everest Base Camp Trek is a challenging but rewarding hike through the Khumbu Valley, offering stunning views of Mount Everest and other Himalayan giants.

Learn More
Annapurna Base Camp Trek

The Annapurna Base Camp Trek is a moderately challenging trek through diverse landscapes in Nepal, culminating in breathtaking views of the Annapurna mountain range.

Learn More
Makalu Base Camp

Makalu Base Camp is a challenging trek in eastern Nepal, the world's fifth-highest mountain, rich biodiversity, and a cultural experience through remote villages.

Learn More
Manaslu Circuit Trek

The Manaslu Circuit Trek traverses Nepal's Manaslu region, offering a challenging adventure with remote charm and high-altitude beauty.

Learn More
Upper Mustang Trek

Explore the unique culture and dramatic landscapes of Mustang, Nepal, on a challenging trek through the "forbidden kingdom."

Learn More
Kanchenjunga Base Camp Trek

The Kanchenjunga Base Camp Trek offers a remote Himalayan adventure with the world's third-highest peak as your reward.

Learn More
Upper Dolpo Trek

Embark on a challenging journey through Dolpo, Nepal, encountering ancient Buddhist villages, endangered wildlife, and the remoteness of the hidden Trans-Himalayan region.

Learn More
Dhaulagiri Circuit Trek

The Dhaulagiri Circuit Trek is a challenging high-altitude adventure in Nepal, offering breathtaking Himalayan panoramas and unique off-the-beaten-path experiences.

Learn More
Langtang Trek

The Langtang Trek is a moderate trek in Nepal with stunning Himalayan scenery, perfect for acclimatization and offering glimpses of glaciers and charming villages.

Learn More
Mount Kailash Tour

Embark on a pilgrimage or trek around the sacred Mount Kailash in Tibet, a challenging journey imbued with religious significance and breathtaking Himalayan vistas.

Learn More
